## Debt description

Describe the debt and why it exists.

## Current risk

- Reliability risk:
- Security/compliance risk:
- Delivery risk:

## Proposed remediation

Describe the smallest safe remediation path.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Risk reduced and validated
- [ ] Tests updated where logic changed
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Traceability

- Planned branch name: `chore/<issue-id>-short-description`
- Changelog impact: yes / no
